Y2k Hub - ready-to-post loaders (paste in executor)
Test key: Y2K-TEST-1749-e9d3
=======================================================

# Sell a Lemon\Sell a Lemon.lua
loadstring(game:HttpGet("https://y2k-keys.y2kscript.workers.dev/loader?name=Sell%20a%20Lemon%2FSell%20a%20Lemon"))()
